caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a striped shirt and over-ear headphones with an attached microphone, is speaking while facing a camera in an indoor setting. She is positioned in front of a white wall, with a light-colored curtain and a blue fabric drape visible to her right. To her left, the edge of a light-colored table or shelf is partially visible. Across the bottom left of each frame, the on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" appears. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to speak, with her mouth opening and closing and her facial expressions shifting slightly. In the final frame, her right hand becomes partially visible at the bottom left of the screen as she gestures while talking. The lighting and background remain constant throughout the clip.
